message:
🐛 Fix Event Stream empty on load + remove Latest Benchmark from main dashboard (#2777)

**Event Stream fix:**
The events hook only fetched via the Go backend REST API, which requires
OAuth authentication. On initial load (before auth completes) or for
local-only setups, the fetcher returned [] immediately.

Added agent-first path matching the pattern used by pod issues and
deployments — tries kubectlProxy.getEvents() across all clusters before
falling back to the REST API. Progressive fetcher also uses the agent
path, streaming events cluster-by-cluster as they arrive.

**Latest Benchmark removal:**
Removed benchmark_hero card from the main dashboard default card set.
It belongs on the llm-d Benchmarks dashboard, not the main dashboard.
Compliance Score card expanded to full width to fill the space.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
